scope: GSC-only (Google Search Console + keyword master list). Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility sections remain manual and are intentionally NOT auto-generated here.
wins: Core local terms hold the top of page 1: 'bariatric surgery counseling san antonio' #1.0, 'bariatric counseling san antonio' #1.5, 'weight loss counseling san antonio' #2.0, and 'emotional eating therapy san antonio' #3.0 (positions from 1-2 impressions each, directional).

Biggest real mover: 'bariatric counseling' improved +11.6 positions (27.1 -> 15.5) on 26 impressions with the only tracked click this snapshot; 'bariatric surgery counseling' (national) jumped +3.0 to #1.0 on 1 impression.

Blog content drives nearly all impressions at page-1 depth: the hydration post pulled 2,769 impressions @ avg pos 6.0 (15 clicks) and the weight-loss-medications (Wegovy/Ozempic/Zepbound/Mounjaro) post pulled 2,705 impressions @ pos 9.7.

Recent visibility trend is up: impression-weighted avg position improved across the last five snapshots from 21.36 (06-03) to 18.44 (06-08); 'eating disorder iop san antonio' moved +9.0 (25 -> 16) and 'weight loss therapy san antonio' +1.0 (20 -> 19).
needs_attention: Keyword coverage (KEYWORD count, not pages): 19 of 67 tracked keywords show GSC impressions; 48 show none. This is a keyword count, not a page count -- and many no-impression keywords point at stale staging/old-slug tracker URLs that GSC can't match. Of 42 distinct target pages in the master list, 21 are staging-targeted; per the 2026-06-03 sitemap check most staging-targeted tracker URLs are stale pointers to pages already live on www (a hygiene issue, not lost traffic).

Volume drift over the full window: impressions fell from 2,447 (05-07) to 1,857 (06-08, about -24%) and avg position drifted from 14.87 to 18.44 over the same span, even though the last week recovered.
Near-zero CTR: 1,857 impressions produced only 6 clicks on the latest snapshot (about 0.3%); high-impression blog posts are not converting impressions into clicks.

Commercial/national terms slipped with real impressions: 'nutrition counseling' -37.3 (12.0 -> 49.3, 3 impr), 'holistic approach to weight loss' -12.0 (40 -> 52, 2 impr), 'weight loss counseling' -8.6 (47.7 -> 56.2, 4 impr), and 'bariatric therapist' -1.8 (8.0 -> 9.8, 4 impr).
Caveat: most tracked positions rest on 1-2 impressions and swing day to day; treat individual position deltas as directional, not precise.
priority_actions: Keyword-tracker hygiene (highest leverage): repoint the 21 staging-targeted / old-slug targetUrl values in keywords-master.json to their correct live www URLs so GSC can attribute impressions; this alone should lift apparent coverage without any new publishing.

Fix CTR: add clear CTAs and internal links from the top blog posts (hydration 2,769 impr; weight-loss-medications 2,705 impr; self-esteem 946 impr) into the matching service pages so page-1 impressions convert to clicks and assisted conversions.

On-page refresh for the slipped national terms (nutrition counseling, holistic approach to weight loss, weight loss counseling) -- tighten title/H1/intro and internal links to recover the lost positions.

Defend the core local #1-#3 cluster (bariatric counseling SA, weight loss counseling SA, emotional eating therapy SA, bariatric surgery counseling) with fresh internal links and content updates so competitors cannot displace them.
Add FAQ schema to the high-impression service and blog pages for rich-result and AI-overview eligibility (still a manual step; GSC cannot confirm it).
If a staging->prod publish backlog matters, confirm the real push list via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's own notes -- do not infer a page count from keyword/GSC data.
summary: GSC-only pulse: 19 of 67 tracked keywords show impressions and the core San Antonio terms hold #1-#3, with 'bariatric counseling' the standout mover (+11.6 to #15.5 on 26 impressions); week-over-week avg position recovered to 18.44 but CTR is near zero (6 clicks on 1,857 impressions) and a few national terms (notably nutrition counseling, -37.3) slipped. Top priority is tracker hygiene -- repointing the 21 staging-targeted URLs in the master list to live www pages -- followed by adding CTAs/internal links from high-impression blog posts. Competitor and AI-visibility sections remain manual.
